verdict.note: 隔离 spex-init 仓库三段实测：内容提交 → version 1→2、reason=commit subject、session=显式 Session: probe-sess-42 trailer；纯 rename/reparent（basename 不变，移入中文父目录）→ version/reason/session 全不变、parent 重派生为 中文测试节点；仓库根无任何派生存储文件。git 即数据库成立。
version/reason/session derived from git; pure rename bumps nothing; no datastore beside .spec.

isolated spex-init repo: content commit bumps v1→v2 with subject as reason + Session trailer as attribution; pure reparent (R100) bumps nothing; no datastore beside .spec (clean status, only config/shims)

re-measured at 8260888e after parseRelation threading: content commit bumps v1→v2 with reason+Session trailer derived on read; pure rename/reparent does NOT bump; no persisted derivation state beside .spec

re-measure post loadSpecs-root param: isolated spex init --harness claude repo, three git moves through the real CLI — birth commit derives v1 + subject-as-reason + Session trailer; content edit bumps to v2 with new reason/session; a PURE git-mv reparent bumps NOTHING (still v2/reworded/sess-deriv-b); nothing persisted beside .spec except init scaffolding (CLAUDE.md, .claude/*, spexcode.json) — derived on read, never stored
